nodes.name: Publish Webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered by admin UI approve action or scheduled publish

nodes.name: Fetch Content + Config
nodes.notes: Fetch full content and platform credentials via Supabase REST API

nodes.name: Prepare LinkedIn Post
nodes.notes: Build LinkedIn API payload from content and credentials

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ author: $json.author_urn, lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', specificContent: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': { shareCommentary: { text: $json.full_text }, shareMediaCategory: $json.has_image ? 'IMAGE' : 'NONE' } }, visibility: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC' } }) }}

nodes.name: LinkedIn Create Post
nodes.notes: Create LinkedIn post via UGC API. Image upload step can be added before this.

nodes.name: Update Status Published
nodes.notes: Mark content as published in queue via Supabase REST API

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, platform_post_id: $node['LinkedIn Create Post'].json.id || null }) }}
